blended.narrative: Okemo is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
